entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop grown in small plots as an upland crop in East Timor.

entities.name: EAST TIMOR
entities.description: The country where groundnut cultivation and the ACIAR project are focused.

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of groundnut cultivars to produce a certain amount of crop per unit area.

entities.name: ACIAR ‘SEEDS OF LIFE — EAST TIMOR’ PROJECT
entities.description: A project aimed at introducing and trialling new groundnut cultivars in East Timor.

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing high-quality seeds for planting.

entities.name: SEED PROCESSING
entities.description: The handling and preparation of seeds after harvest.

entities.name: FOOD PROCESSING INDUSTRY
entities.description: The local industry involved in processing groundnuts for food.

entities.name: OIL PROCESSING INDUSTRY
entities.description: The local industry involved in extracting oil from groundnuts.
